title: METİFLAM (Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center)
content:
METİFLAM (Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center)

METİFLAM (Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center)

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

The prevalence of metabolic and inflammatory diseases is increasing in our country and all over the world. However, more effective methods are needed in the diagnosis and treatment of these diseases. In this context, Metabolic and Inflammatory Diseases Application and Research Center (METİFLAM) is a center established with a focus on conducting scientific research in order to understand the mechanisms underlying chronic, inflammatory and metabolic diseases and to bring different perspectives to the diagnosis / treatment approaches to be developed. In addition, the activities of the center include participating in and organizing scientific programs such as conferences, seminars, congresses and symposiums on related topics.
